channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Dangerous heat wave is building, will bring oppressive temperatures to much of the United States
item.description: A widespread and dangerous heat wave is building across the U.S., with triple-digit highs expected in the Southwest and Great Plains this weekend.

item.title: Takeaways from a weeklong preliminary hearing in the Charlie Kirk murder case
More than 200 people at a summer camp helicoptered to safe as Missouri faces flooding
